```yaml
additionalJvmOptions: |
  -Dhttps.proxyHost=your.proxy.host
  -Dhttps.proxyPort=your_proxy_port
  -Dhttp.nonProxyHosts=localhost|127.0.0.1|*.internal|10.*
```
